headline: T. Rowe Price Sees Yuan Falling 1%--2% by Year-End
summary: Asset manager turns underweight yuan, citing expensive valuations and limited upside despite this year's 2.7% rally.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on T. Rowe Price Group, Raises Price Target to $109
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $105 to $109.

headline: Airwallex raises $320m in Series H round at $11bn valuation
summary: The company will use the proceeds to speed up product development in autonomous finance and agentic commerce.

headline: Airwallex hits $11 billion valuation with $320 million raise as fintech pushes into finance run by AI agents
summary: Airwallex raised $320 million to build the financial infrastructure powering a world where AI agents handle business payments and finance.
